message:
feat(network): add DHCP lease listing

Add Lease struct and ListLeases() method to enumerate all DHCP leases
from the dnsmasq lease file. Each lease includes expiry timestamp, MAC
address, IP address, hostname, and client ID.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
